target_market_label.zh: 吉布提（ANGMV / 能源部 / EDD）
target_market_label.zht: 吉布地（ANGMV / 能源部 / EDD）

title.en: China-to-Djibouti Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入吉布提：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入吉布地：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Djibouti ANGMV, Ministry of Energy, and Electricite de Djibouti project requirements, IEC 62109 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface performance, IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 EMC evidence, 230/400 V 50 Hz grid settings, limited national standards capacity, and extreme desert heat derating considerations — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与吉布提ANGMV、能源部和Electricite de Djibouti项目要求、IEC 62109安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公共电网接口性能、IEC 62920和IEC 61000 EMC证据、230/400 V 50 Hz电网参数、有限国家标准能力及极端沙漠高温降额因素——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與吉布地ANGMV、能源部和Electricite de Djibouti項目要求、IEC 62109安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公共電網介面性能、IEC 62920和IEC 61000 EMC證據、230/400 V 50 Hz電網參數、有限國家標準能力及極端沙漠高溫降額因素——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ANGMV conformity scope determination, Ministry of Energy approval, Electricite de Djibouti grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Djibouti standards, import, electrical safety, grid-connection, fire-safety, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ANGMV合格评定范围裁定、能源部批准、Electricite de Djibouti并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行吉布提标准、进口、电气安全、并网、消防安全及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ANGMV合格評定範圍裁定、能源部批准、Electricite de Djibouti併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行吉布地標準、進口、電氣安全、併網、消防安全及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Djibouti, the key practical gaps are: (1) Djibouti's national standards and conformity infrastructure is comparatively limited, so project-owner, Ministry of Energy, ANGMV, customs, and EDD connection conditions must be confirmed case by case; (2) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence is the practical international baseline for bankable PV inverter projects; (3) IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence should be prepared for EDD grid review; (4) IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-series EMC evidence should supplement China GB/T EMC files; and (5) Djibouti uses 230/400 V at 50 Hz. The 50 Hz frequency aligns with China, but the voltage differs from China's 220/380 V, so firmware protection thresholds, reconnection settings, thermal derating, and site commissioning must be validated for Djibouti conditions.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口吉布提时，主要实际差距包括：（1）吉布提国家标准和合格评定基础设施相对有限，因此须逐项确认项目业主、能源部、ANGMV、海关和EDD接入条件；（2）IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据是可融资光伏逆变器项目的实际国际基准；（3）应为EDD并网审查准备IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公共电网接口证据；（4）IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列EMC证据应补充中国GB/T EMC文件；（5）吉布提采用230/400 V、50 Hz。频率50 Hz与中国一致，但电压不同于中国220/380 V，因此须针对吉布提条件验证固件保护阈值、重连设置、热降额和现场调试。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口吉布地時，主要實際差距包括：（1）吉布地國家標準和合格評定基礎設施相對有限，因此須逐項確認項目業主、能源部、ANGMV、海關和EDD接入條件；（2）IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據是可融資光伏逆變器項目的實際國際基準；（3）應為EDD併網審查準備IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公共電網介面證據；（4）IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列EMC證據應補充中國GB/T EMC文件；（5）吉布地採用230/400 V、50 Hz。頻率50 Hz與中國一致，但電壓不同於中國220/380 V，因此須針對吉布地條件驗證韌體保護閾值、重連設置、熱降額和現場調試。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
